aliases: EZVIZ H9c Dual 4G 3K Dual-Lens Pan & Tilt 4G & Wi-Fi Camera
field_of_view_deg: Top lens: 0-240 pan (manual)/15 fixed tilt, 110 diagonal/96 horizontal/54 vertical optical; Bottom lens: 350 pan/80 tilt, 60 diagonal/52 horizontal/28 vertical optical
features: dual-lens pan/tilt outdoor camera with 4G LTE + Wi-Fi + Ethernet, wired DC power -- near-identical hardware to the existing C9c Dual 3K
top lens 2.8mm wide + bottom lens 6mm tele, both F1.6
hybrid night vision: color up to 40m (same direction) / B&W 30m
no officially confirmed RTSP/ONVIF -- official docs list only 'EZVIZ Cloud Proprietary Protocol'
